name: automation-framework
description: Playwright + Cucumber BDD automation framework for FMT OS and FMT Pro

scripts.test:fmt-os: node src/shared/scripts/run-suite.js src/config/cucumber.config.cjs reports/fmt-os-report.json "FMT OS" --profile fmt-os
scripts.test:fmt-os:smoke: node src/shared/scripts/run-suite.js src/config/cucumber.config.cjs reports/fmt-os-smoke-report.json "FMT OS Smoke" --profile fmt-os-smoke
scripts.test:fmt-pro: node src/shared/scripts/run-suite.js src/config/cucumber.config.cjs reports/fmt-pro-report.json "FMT Pro" --profile fmt-pro
scripts.test:fmt-pro:smoke: node src/shared/scripts/run-suite.js src/config/cucumber.config.cjs reports/fmt-pro-smoke-report.json "FMT Pro Smoke" --profile fmt-pro-smoke
scripts.test:smoke: node src/shared/scripts/run-suite.js src/config/cucumber.config.cjs reports/smoke-report.json "Smoke Suite" --profile all-smoke
scripts.test:regression: node src/shared/scripts/run-suite.js src/config/cucumber.config.cjs reports/regression-report.json "Full Regression" --profile all
scripts.clean:reports: rm -rf reports/*.html reports/*.json reports/*.jsonl; rm -f reports/selector-intelligence-summary.md
